mapper.insert:
insert into bio_sample_test_two_result_tb(id,apply_no,sample_code, sample_id,run_id,create_time, upload_num,test_channel,syn_result, fail_message) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.applyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sampleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.runId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.uploadNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testChannel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.synResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.failMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select:
select
from bio_sample_test_two_result_tb where sample_code = #{sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by id desc
